notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford singles on a ground ball to shortstop Willy Adames. Bryson Stott scores.

notableEvents.label: Bryce Harper GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper grounds into a double play, second baseman Luis Arraez to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Kyle Schwarber out at 2nd. Bryce Harper out at 1st.
